# GitHub Discussions setup

Recommended categories for this project:

| Category | Purpose |
|---|---|
| Announcements | Releases, milestones, roadmap updates |
| General | General usage and community questions |
| Q&A | Troubleshooting and implementation questions |
| Ideas | Feature proposals and design sketches |
| Show and tell | Real deployments, demos, diagrams, benchmarks |
| Source adapters | Discussion for new RDBMS source connectors |
| Sink adapters | Discussion for new analytical sinks |
| Operations | Kafka, Debezium, ClickHouse, observability, production issues |

Enable Discussions in GitHub repo settings, then create the categories above manually.
